name: Thai Grilled Chicken - Midsummer Thai Dinner
recipeIngredient: 4 boneless chicken breasts with skin on
recipeInstructions:
1. Thread the chicken breasts onto bamboo skewers.
2. Brush the chicken with soy sauce and set aside to marinate for at least 30 minutes.
3. Preheat a grill or skillet over medium-high heat.
4. Place the chicken on the hot surface and cook until browned, about 3-4 minutes per side.
5. Brush the chicken with oyster sauce and sprinkle chili flakes (or Chinese chili sauce) over it.
6. Continue grilling until cooked through, about 2-3 more minutes per side.
7. Remove from heat and let rest for a few minutes before serving.
8. Garnish with chopped coriander, mint springs, and sliced green onions.
9. Serve the chicken on lettuce wraps with rice or steamed vegetables.
